entities.Project: A repository or workspace governed by one AgentTeam runtime configuration.
entities.Artifact: A durable file or record with authority class, owner, version, and lifecycle.
entities.RoleAgent: A long-lived logical responsibility boundary with identity, role contract, state, mailbox subscriptions, and permission profile.
entities.RuntimeSession: A short-lived execution incarnation of a role agent on a concrete backend such as Codex or Claude Code.
entities.RuntimeAdapter: A backend-normalizing boundary that starts, observes, stops, and parses RuntimeSession output.
entities.Scheduler: The deterministic control-plane process that selects work, issues leases, invokes adapters, and records events.
entities.MailboxMessage: A durable request or result envelope used to coordinate work.
entities.Event: An append-only fact emitted after a state transition or observation.
entities.Task: A backlog unit with semantic refs, scopes, risk target, verification policy, and scheduling status.
entities.Attempt: A concrete try to execute a task by one assigned role and runtime backend.
entities.Lease: A time-bounded claim that prevents duplicate execution of the same attempt or agent assignment.
entities.Worktree: A git workspace assigned to one writable attempt.
entities.ContextPack: A bounded context bundle assembled for one task attempt.
entities.Validator: A gate that checks output schema, scope, evidence, risk, and authority implications.
entities.Integrator: A serial gate that applies accepted code, backlog, or artifact changes.

roles.scheduler: Deterministic software role that owns control-plane mechanics.
roles.repo_map_agent: Read-only semantic role that maintains repository navigation observations.
roles.context_builder_agent: Read-only role that builds task-local context packs.
roles.risk_classifier_agent: Semantic role or rule gate that assigns evidence and review depth.
roles.worker_agent: Writable role that executes bounded task attempts.
roles.verification_agent: Read-mostly role that runs or designs verification and interprets failures.
roles.patch_integrator: Controlled write role that serially integrates accepted patches.
roles.semantic_feedback_agent: Semantic role that converts implementation-discovered design gaps into proposals.
roles.watchdog: Deterministic liveness monitor with optional semantic diagnosis.

authority_classes.implementation_authority: Defines how one approved implementation run realizes the semantic contract.
authority_classes.derived_observation: Records generated or observed facts that may become stale.
authority_classes.evidence_note: Records evidence and rationale without redefining authority.
